outputs.primary_text:
My son's dream school felt out of reach because of the SAT. It was awful seeing his confidence drop.

Varsity Tutors SAT Tutoring changed everything. Their 1-on-1 sessions fit perfectly around his baseball schedule, and the tutor focused on exactly what he needed for the digital SAT. He gained 180 points after 12 sessions and got accepted!

Want to see how they can help your child?
outputs.headline: Unlock Your Child's Scholarship Potential
outputs.cta_button: Talk to an SAT specialist today

outputs.primary_text:
My son's dream is to play college ball, but his SAT scores were holding him back. I was so worried the recruiting window would close. Varsity Tutors made it easy to schedule SAT Tutoring around his crazy practice schedule – even late evenings! They pinpointed his Algebra 2 weaknesses right away. 

It's not just about the score; it's about showing colleges he's serious about academics too.

Click below to talk to an SAT specialist and see how they can help your child!

outputs.description: Personalized SAT Tutoring to fit demanding schedules.

Worried your child's SAT score won't reflect their dedication? I was. My son, a swimmer, was crushing practice but bombing the math section. We tried Varsity Tutors SAT Tutoring. 

They pinpointed his Algebra II weaknesses with a diagnostic test and built a tutoring schedule around his swim meets. Now he's actually confident going into the SAT!

Want to see how they can help your child?
